title: SimpleChatPlugin
description: A simple yet feature-rich Minecraft chat management plugin.
body:
# SimpleChat

A simple yet feature-rich Minecraft chat management plugin.

## Features
- Chat color code support
- Item display feature ([i] or [item])
- Player mute system
- Sign color codes
- Anvil color codes
- PlaceholderAPI support
- @Player mention system
- Advanced chat format system
  - Customizable world prefix
  - Hover text with player information
  - Click actions for commands
- Player name hover tooltips
  - Show player location
  - Display online time
  - Quick private message access
- Real-time configuration
  - In-game reload command
  - No server restart needed
  - Maintains all functionality

## Commands
- `/mute <player> <duration> <reason>` - Mute a player
  - Duration format: 1s(seconds), 1m(minutes), 1h(hours), 1d(days), 1w(weeks), 1mo(months), 1y(years)
- `/unmute <player>` - Unmute a player

## Permissions
- `simplechat.chat.color` - Allow using color codes in chat
- `simplechat.chat.mentionall` - Allow using @all feature
- `simplechat.sign.color` - Allow using color codes on signs
- `simplechat.anvil.color` - Allow using color codes in anvil
- `simplechat.mute` - Allow using mute-related commands

## Configuration
Plugin configuration file is located at `plugins/SimpleChat/config.yml`

## Dependencies
- PlaceholderAPI (Optional)

## Support
- Folia Support
- Compatible with 1.21+
